name: FARMERS + MERCH. BK DL 20
summary: FARMERS + MERCH. BK DL 20 is likely referring to Farmers & Merchants Bancorp, a community bank headquartered in Archbold, Ohio. The bank provides a range of financial services, including commercial and retail banking, wealth management, and insurance. Farmers & Merchants serves individuals, businesses, and agricultural customers in Northwest Ohio and Northeast Indiana.
